positive: A majestic, intricate celestial garden scene. Center composition featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna, including glowing mandalas of oversized, stylized flowers and gentle, ethereal cosmic dust clouds. Elements include stylized lunar cycles intersecting with deep-sea bioluminescence. The style is neo-vintage maximalism meets psychedelic art, rendered with thick, clean vector lines and strong, graphic contrast. Color palette is deep indigo, vibrant teal, glowing gold, and sapphire blue. Composition must feature clear, impactful silhouettes against a dark background, optimized for textile printing. Highly detailed, symmetrical, and visually balanced.
